title: Arizona Police Used a Tarp to Catch a Bear Falling From a Tree
script: Bear fell on a cop! The Sahuarita Police Department was called to a home in Rancho Sahuarita, Arizona on June 3 after a black bear climbed a tree in someone's yard. Arizona Game and Fish officers tranquilized it, then officers and wildlife crew stretched a tarp beneath the branches to catch the bear when it fell. The bear was heavier than expected, came down hard, and one officer toppled right onto the sedated animal on live camera. The video went viral this week, racking up millions of views. No one was hurt — not the officer, and not the bear, which was safely relocated to the wild. Game and Fish says the bear was a healthy young adult just wandering through the suburb. Would you have stood under that tarp?
